name: French Onion Soup Coca-Cola
recipeIngredient: French bread, cut into Thick slices
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy saucepan, melt the butter.
2. Add onions and cook until they are golden, do not brown.
3. Add the undiluted beef broth, 2 cans of water, COCA-COLA, salt, vinegar, and pepper.
4. Cover and simmer for 20 to 25 minutes.
5. Toast one side of the French bread slices in a broiler.
6. Turn and generously sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
7. Toast until browned.
8. Ladle the soup into deep bowls and top with the toast, cheese-sided up.
9. Makes 4 servings or about 6 cups.
Recipe: "International Cooking with Coca-Cola", a giveaway pamphlet from The Coca-Cola Company, 1981
